files.text:
name: static-analysis
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  scan:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
      - run: sudo apt-get install -y clang-tools cppcheck
      - run: scan-build --status-bugs make
      - run: cppcheck --error-exitcode=1 --enable=warning,style src
      - run: make CFLAGS="-fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -O1 -g"
